text: Suno v5 (2025) produces broadcast-quality music from text prompts with 8-minute tracks, multi-language vocals (English, Chinese, Japanese, Spanish), genre-specific accuracy, and studio-quality 48kHz output — positioning AI as a production-ready music creation tool.

MusicLM (Agostinelli et al., Google, 2023) generates high-fidelity music from text descriptions by treating music generation as a hierarchical sequence-to-sequence modeling problem — combining AudioLM's acoustic tokenization with MuLan's text-music joint embedding.
